raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 537 requires that mandatory hotel and resort fees be disclosed in the advertised room rate.",
    "Surprise hotel fees are considered dishonest and misleading.",
    "Deceptive advertising in the short-term lodging industry has significantly increased over the last few years.",
    "Many hotels fail to disclose mandatory fees in advance, often revealing them only at checkout.",
    "An analysis by the Los Angeles Times found that at least one thousand of the 40,000 Airbnb listings charged a cleaning fee that was only $10 less than the nightly rate.",
    "The same study found that 83% of short-term rentals in Los Angeles charged a cleaning fee ranging from $5 to $1,500.",
    "In 2018, U.S. hotels generated approximately $3 billion in mandatory hotel fees, reflecting an 8.5% increase compared to 2017."
  ]
}
```
